notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daniel Schneemann. Zack Gelof to 3rd. Jeff McNeil to 2nd. Jeff McNeil advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Daniel Schneemann.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Colby Thomas. Kyle Manzardo scores.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez flies out to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Rhys Hoskins out at 2nd. Angel Martínez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Rhys Hoskins out at 2nd. Angel Martínez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Jeff McNeil to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter singles on a line drive to right fielder Colby Thomas, deflected by second baseman Jeff McNeil. Steven Kwan to 3rd. Steven Kwan advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Colby Thomas.

notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler grounds into a force out, second baseman Travis Bazzana to shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Colby Thomas out at 2nd. Lawrence Butler to 1st.
